message:
fix(core,btree,parser,pager): SQL comment stripping in CREATE TABLE parsing, cursor API migration, and schema introspection robustness

Major compat_persist overhaul:
- Rewrite split_top_level_csv_items() to handle SQL line comments
  (-- ...) that appear inline in CREATE TABLE column definitions.
  Previously, comments containing commas or constraint keywords
  caused incorrect column splitting, breaking schema introspection
  for databases like beads_rust whose CREATE TABLE statements include
  inline documentation comments
- Switch from byte-based to char-based iteration for correct UTF-8
  handling in quoted identifiers and comment detection
- Improve starts_with_unquoted_table_constraint() to match multi-word
  constraints (PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY) and constraint keywords
  immediately followed by parentheses (CHECK(...), UNIQUE(...))
- Return Vec<String> from split_top_level_csv_items() instead of
  Vec<&str> since comment stripping produces new strings
- Add comprehensive test covering all beads_rust table schemas
  (issues, labels, comments, events, config, blocked_issues_cache)
  with inline comments and CHECK constraints

Btree cursor refactoring:
- Migrate index_seek_bug_test from SimplePager to MemPageStore API,
  removing dependency on deprecated pager constructor
- Register index_seek_bug_test as a module in btree lib.rs
- Fix cursor depth assertion to use measure_tree_depth() instead of
  accessing metrics snapshot directly

Connection improvements:
- Add read_master_rowids() helper for lighter-weight sqlite_master
  introspection (rowids only, no payload parsing)
- Add schema_loading_tests module with local read_master_rows()
  helper using BtCursor + parse_record for self-contained tests
- Fix formatting in active_concurrent_txn_count() and
  wal_checkpoint_blocked_by_active_concurrent_txns()

Other fixes:
- Update encoding_pipeline_verification test expectations
- Update golden blake3 conformance hashes
- Refresh runtime_stub_inventory.toml with current stub definitions
- Minor value.rs and engine.rs adjustments for type coercion edge cases
- Pager page_cache and pager.rs improvements
- Parser semantic_test_hack and lib.rs updates
- Builtins function adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
